settings.show_stats_profile: Show stats next to avatar in profile
settings.show_stats_posts: Show stats next to avatar in posts

settings.notify_draw_cancelled_label: Opponent cancelled a draw on Arena

surrender.title: Surrender
surrender.confirm_text: The opponent will win and the battle will end. This action cannot be undone
surrender.error: Failed to surrender. Please try again

propose_draw.title: Draw
propose_draw.confirm_text: The opponent will receive a draw proposal notification, and the turn timer will pause. This action can be cancelled before the other player responds
propose_draw.waiting_subtitle: Waiting for the opponent's response. Turn timer paused
propose_draw.error: Failed to propose a draw. Please try again
propose_draw.cancel_error: Failed to cancel the proposal. Please try again

respond_draw.title: Draw proposed
respond_draw.pending_subtitle: {name} proposes a draw. Turn timer paused
respond_draw.error: Failed to send response. Please try again

notifications.draw_proposed_text: {proposer} proposes a draw in your Arena battle
notifications.draw_cancelled_text: {canceller} cancelled the draw in your Arena battle

challenge_modal.no_deck: You need to build a deck of 20 cards first.

battle_start.first_turn_subtitle: The card deck is only visible during your turn

battle_turn.heading: Turn {turn} result

battle_draw.title: Draw

battle_expired.title: {name} wins

override.title: Player parameters
override.help: Overrides settings for this player. Leave empty to use the default values
override.error: Failed to save. Please try again

deck.title: My deck
deck.subtitle: Choose 20 cards. You can add only the strongest cards, but then you'll run out of mana fast in battle
deck.error: Failed to save the deck. Please try again

sections.elemental_subtitle: Creatures from different universes. Each element is weaker or stronger than another. {link}
sections.bonus_subtitle: Various effects. The choice depends on your playstyle — go aggressive or play defensively

profile.battle_lock: A battle is in progress — deck editing is unavailable

cards.error_order: Failed to change the order. Please try again

battles.already_inactive: The battle is no longer active. Refresh the list

settings.battle_tag_help: Battles will be created in a topic with this tag
settings.how_to_play_help: Shown below the Challenge button on the Arena tag page. You can create a rules page using Friends of Flarum Pages. Don't add a link to hide the button
settings.style_title: Element and bonus colors and icons
settings.style_help: Overrides the color and FontAwesome icon for the selected element or bonus

card_edit.error_save: Failed to save. Please try again
card_edit.inactive_help: Inactive cards are unavailable when building decks

recalculate.title: Recalculate statistics
recalculate.warning: Recalculate wins, losses, and draws for all players based on the information in the database
recalculate.in_progress_warning: Don't close the page while recalculating
recalculate.error: Failed to recalculate battles. Please try again

bonus_effect_descriptions.poison: Deals 1 HP per turn for {value, plural, one {{value} turn} other {{value} turns}}
bonus_effect_descriptions.weaken: Reduces attack by 1 for {value, plural, one {{value} turn} other {{value} turns}}. Takes effect starting next turn
bonus_effect_descriptions.reflect: Reflects up to {value} damage back to the opponent. Won't trigger if 0 damage was taken
bonus_effect_descriptions.mana_steal: Drains {value, plural, one {{value} mana} other {{value} mana}} from the opponent and gives it to you
bonus_effect_descriptions.debuff_remove: Removes negative effects, including ones applied this turn
bonus_effect_descriptions.overload: Deals up to {value} pure damage. Bypasses any defense
bonus_effect_descriptions.resonance: If the element matches the previous turn's card — grants +{value} to attack and defense
bonus_effect_descriptions.sacrifice: Reduces your elemental card's attack by {value} and restores up to {value} HP
bonus_effect_descriptions.swap_stats: Swaps your elemental card's attack and defense for this turn
bonus_effect_descriptions.random_effect: Triggers a random bonus card effect from your deck
bonus_effect_descriptions.amplify: Doubles the strength of an active poison or weaken effect until it ends

errors.not_participant: You are not a participant in this battle
errors.deck_incomplete_opponent: The opponent hasn't built their deck yet
errors.battle_already_active: You already have an active battle with this player
errors.invalid_image_type: Only jpg, png, gif, webp images are allowed
errors.file_too_large: The file is too large (5 MB max)
errors.draw_disabled: Draws are disabled by forum settings
errors.draw_already_proposed: A draw has already been proposed, waiting for a response
errors.cant_respond_own_proposal: You can't respond to your own proposal
errors.cancel_not_own_proposal: You can only cancel your own proposal
errors.deck_composition: The deck must contain 10 elemental and 10 bonus cards. Currently: {elementalCount} elemental, {bonusCount} bonus
errors.deck_locked_active_battle: You can't change your deck during an active battle
errors.cant_play_bonus_as_main: You can't play a bonus card as the main card
errors.card_not_in_deck: This card is not in your deck
errors.card_already_played: This card has already been played in this battle
errors.need_one_main_one_bonus: You must play one elemental and one bonus card per turn
errors.card_not_bonus: This card is not a bonus card
errors.bonus_card_not_in_deck: No such card in your deck
errors.bonus_card_already_played: This card has already been played in this battle
